# Magnet

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Magnet;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Magnet { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
horseshoe, lock, science, snap

design
